summary: Atmospheric audience recording captures an energetic Hampton show with a scorching Help>Slip>Franklin opener, The Wheel and a rocking US Blues encore.
review: The tape delivers the raw, crowd‑filled feel of an audience source while still sounding clear enough to enjoy the band’s high‑energy performance. Highlights include a blistering Help > Slip > Franklin opening, a standout rendition of The Wheel, and a rousing US Blues encore, all buoyed by Phil’s powerful vocals. Reviewers note the fog‑filled atmosphere and overall fun vibe despite it not being a “perfect” show.

ai_rating.rationale: All three reviewers gave 4‑star ratings, praised the performance’s energy and highlighted several standout songs while also noting good sound quality for an audience recording.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Great sound that captures crowd ambience; listeners feel the fog, lights and excitement. No major drop‑outs or distortion reported.

show_quality.setlist_flow: A high‑octane opening with Help>Slip>Franklin set the tone, followed by a consistently energetic first and second set that built to a powerful US Blues encore; the fog and crowd reactions add to the momentum.

band_member_comments.Phil: His vocals were described as “bombs,” delivering strong, emotive singing throughout.
band_member_comments.Keys: Brent’s keyboard work was praised as a class above, keeping the band tight and supportive.
